title: UNOPTFLAT lint warning (for tree arbiter)
body:
If you download the attached `prim_arbiter_tree.sv` and run Verilator lint on it, you see the following warnings:
```
> verilator --lint-only -Wno-ALWCOMBORDER tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:45:39: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: 'prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.idx_tree[5:4]'
   45 |     logic [2**(IdxW+1)-2:0][IdxW-1:0] idx_tree /*verilator split_var*/ ;
      |                                       ^~~~~~~~
                    ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/UNOPTFLAT?v=4.203
                    ... Use "/* verilator lint_off UNOPTFLAT */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:45:39:      Example path: prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.idx_tree[5:4]
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:108:11:      Example path: ALWAYS
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:43:39:      Example path: prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.sel_tree[2]
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:108:11:      Example path: ALWAYS
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:45:39:      Example path: prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.idx_tree[5:4]
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:46:39: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: 'prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.data_tree[2]'
   46 |     logic [2**(IdxW+1)-2:0][DW-1:0]   data_tree /*verilator split_var*/ ;
      |                                       ^~~~~~~~~
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:46:39:      Example path: prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.data_tree[2]
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:108:11:      Example path: ALWAYS
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:43:39:      Example path: prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.sel_tree[2]
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:108:11:      Example path: ALWAYS
                    tst/prim_arbiter_tree.sv:46:39:      Example path: prim_arbiter_tree.gen_normal_case.data_tree[2]
%Error: Exiting due to 2 warning(s)
```

This is with the current head of master:
```
> verilator --version
Verilator 4.203 devel rev v4.202-41-g0f7ec6c9
```

The code is a (slightly hacked) version of a tree arbiter [from OpenTitan](https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/blob/master/hw/ip/prim/rtl/prim_arbiter_tree.sv). This is structured as a full binary tree and I've set parameters so that it has 4 leaves, giving the following indices:
```
     0
    / \
   /   \
  1     2
 / \   / \
|   | |   |
3   4 5   6
```

I chose parameters to give a data width of just 1 bit, which makes the apparent mutual dependency between `data_tree` and `sel_tree` as easy as possible to debug. I can't see any path between them, so I *think* this is a bug?


[prim_arbiter_tree.sv.txt](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/6502367/prim_arbiter_tree.sv.txt)
